desktop_open_check.evidence: pbi-tools info detected the Power BI Desktop session for the exact Project 13 final PBIX.

desktop_save_check.method: Power BI Desktop Ctrl+S on the exact final PBIX after layout patch
desktop_save_check.note: Desktop opened the patched PBIX and accepted Ctrl+S, but LastWriteTime did not change because Power BI did not mark the file dirty after opening the already-patched package.

pbi_tools_extract.note: pbi-tools extract loaded the PBIX model and extracted Report, Model, CustomVisuals, and StaticResources successfully.

visual_evidence.result: Executive Summary renders with the top filter bar above the KPI strip and no visible render-error text in the captured first page viewport.

validation: Power BI Desktop opened the exact final PBIX path
Desktop screenshot captured after render wait
Report/Layout inside the final PBIX has 8 slicers at y=84
No Project 13 Power BI Desktop session was left running; unrelated sessions for other projects were ignored
